name: Animesh
roles: an AI Engineer @ Incedo with an experience of 1.5 years
bio: Software Development Engineer in Incedo's AI & Data division, Hyderabad. I build production GenAI systems , agentic workflows with LangGraph, RAG pipelines over vector stores, and the FastAPI backends that hold them up. B.Tech CSE from VIT Vellore; Android & IoT builder in a past life.
